underlying: Republican margin of victory, 2026 Arkansas U.S. Senate general election (Nov 3, 2026). Incumbent Tom Cotton (R) running.
method: Anchor: 2020 Cotton beat Libertarian Harrington by ~33pt (no Dem on ballot). 2014 Cotton beat Pryor by 17pts. 2024 Trump won AR by ~21pts. Feb 2026 GrayHouse poll: Cotton 58 vs Shoffner 36 (+22). Modeled R margin ~ N(26, 7). Strong R incumbent, mid-tier D challenger.
notes: Incumbent Cotton vs Hallie Shoffner (D) and Wadlin (Lib). Polling Cotton +22 (head-to-head with Shoffner), expanding to +26 with bio info. AR has shifted very R: 2024 Trump +21. Discount slightly for D challenger present (vs 2020 with no Dem). Kalshi YES asks: P22 0.60, P24 0.54, P26 0.48 — market mid ~ 25-26, in line with model.
